### 📋 Select a PR Type
Please switch to the **Preview** tab and click a link to load the correct form:

* [Bug](?expand=1&template=.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/bug.md)
* [New Feature Request](?expand=1&template=.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/feature.md)
* [Documentation Only](?expand=1&template=.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/docs.md)
* [Task](?expand=1&template=.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/task.md)
* [AI](?expand=1&template=.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/artificial-intelligence.md)
